description: Fetch the latest AI articles from Jiqizhixin (机器之心) in reverse chronological order. The site has no true hot ranking, so all sort parameters return the same time-ordered list. Returns title, author, publish time, category, tags, summary, cover image, etc. No authentication required.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of articles to return, between 1 and 20. The API always returns about 20 items; the command truncates client-side.
